items.title: Berkshire Hathaway begins repurchasing shares, CEO Greg Abel buys $15 million in stock
items.description: The 62-year-old executive's purchase came a little more than two months into his tenure running the Omaha, Nebraska-based conglomerate.

items.title: New Berkshire Hathaway CEO still talks with Warren Buffett nearly every day
items.description: Buffett remains chairman of the sprawling, Omaha-based conglomerate and continues to regularly come into the office, Abel said.

items.title: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel vows to keep Buffett's culture of disciplined investing in first annual letter
items.description: Berkshire Hathaway's Greg Abel released his first annual shareholder letter as chief executive.

items.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: BJ's Wholesale, Broadcom, Trade Desk, StubHub & more
items.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.

items.title: Iran war and stocks: Why Global X says 'it might be time to double down' on emerging markets
items.description: It may be time to dive deeper into the emerging markets trade.
